calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short
cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon,
CSR#6840.

Howard Olsen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC.
Witnesses, Rogel J. Carranza and Raja Vanmali, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant PAMELA BARROW.
Defendant Malik Gibson appearing on his own behalf, sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Parties, Plaintiff MANJRO HOSPITALITY LLC and Defendant Malik Gibson, reached an agreement and stated the terms of the settlement for the record.
Trial Date of 9/26/2016 against Defendant Malik Gibson at 9:00AM has been vacated.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and
against defendant PAMELA BARROW as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2524 Lombard Street #22, San
Francisco, California 94123, San Francisco.

Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $1880.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $270.00
for a Total Judgment of $2150.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Assigned To Trial Court
MINI MINUTES: *Defendant Malik Gibson appears late after the case has been assigned to Dept. 514. The Judge tells Defendant to speak with Mr. Olsen*. Plaintiff and Defendant never came back to Dept.501 to report status of the case after Dept. 514.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Manjro Hospitality LLC is present. Represented by Calranza Rogel.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendants Pamela Barrow and Malik Gibson are present.
Attorney Marshall Bentley appearing for defendants in limited scope.

Litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-12-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
